title: Luscious Turkish Tofu Menemen
description: Herbal, silky, romantic vegan Turkish dish cooked in a clay pot with tofu and tomatoes.
instructions: Heat the clay pot over medium heat and drizzle the olive oil.
Slice the onion, bell pepper, and tomatoes into small cubes.
Add the onion and pepper to the pot and sauté until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Pour in the diced tomatoes, add oregano, salt, and pepper, and simmer for 7 minutes until tomatoes soften.
Gently crumble the silken tofu into the pot, stir softly, and season with vinegar.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let the mixture thicken for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt, pepper, or vinegar if needed.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley on top just before serving.
Serve each portion in its own mini cocotte, accompanied by crusty bread if desired.
